name: Crockpot Brunswick Stew
recipeIngredient: 1 bottle (18 oz) hickory smoke BBQ sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Place squirrels and vegetables into crockpot.
2. Add water to fill the pot.
3. Cook on low setting for 8 to 12 hours.
4. Discard the vegetables, retaining the liquid stock.
5. Remove meat from the squirrels, discarding bones.
PART 2
6. Place all ingredients into the crockpot.
7. Add the retained liquid stock.
8. Cook for 6 hours on low setting.
